productName: Thunder Stix - Tilted-DOH-Glass Tip Preroll (1.2g) / Ripped Off Runtz (H)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Ripped off Runtz and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of chemical, blueberry, and berry, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
